# Default metric set for ncu-microarch skill.
# Optimized to keep capture cheap: 8 most-actionable metrics per kernel.
# Comments map each metric to a question the agent might ask.

# === Speed of Light (compute vs memory bound) ===
sm__throughput.avg.pct_of_peak_sustained_elapsed
# "How busy is the SM compute pipeline?" (peak = 100%)

dram__throughput.avg.pct_of_peak_sustained_elapsed
# "How busy is HBM bandwidth?" — high here + low above = memory-bound

# === Occupancy (parallelism reached) ===
smsp__warps_active.avg.pct_of_peak_sustained_active
# "How full are the warp slots?" — low here = launch shape too small

# === Cache hit rates (memory hierarchy) ===
l1tex__t_sector_hit_rate.pct
# L1+TEX cache hit rate

lts__t_sector_hit_rate.pct
# L2 cache hit rate

# === Tensor Core utilization (mixed-precision math) ===
sm__pipe_tensor_cycles_active.avg.pct_of_peak_sustained_active
# "Tensor Cores firing?" — 0% on a GEMM = NOT using TC (red flag on H200 bf16)

# === Top warp stall reasons (why are warps blocked?) ===
smsp__average_warps_issue_stalled_long_scoreboard_per_issue_active
# Waiting on memory-load scoreboard — most common HBM-bound signature

smsp__average_warps_issue_stalled_math_pipe_throttle_per_issue_active
# Math pipe back-pressure — common in tensor-core saturated kernels
